arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains Liverpool challenge as summer transfer plan becomes clear - 'now we have an idea'
arts.sum: Arne Slot insists he and sporting director Richard Hughes are assessing every position at Liverpool ahead of the summer transfer window

arts.ttl: Premier League star likes facing Erling Haaland as surprise Arsenal ace named toughest opponent
arts.sum: Crystal Palace star Maxence Lacroix has named the "most difficult player" he has faced, with the defender claiming he enjoys coming up against Manchester City star Erling Haaland

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed opportunity to send loudest Premier League title message yet to Arsenal
arts.sum: Arne Slot and Virgil van Dijk preview Sunday's trip to the Etihad as Liverpool aim for their win away at Manchester City since 2015 in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Arsenal's Champions League draw has huge impact on Premier League race
arts.sum: Liverpool, Arsenal and Aston Villa all remain in the Champions League knockout stages, with wins for the trio potentially boosting their English rivals' hopes of qualifying for next year's competition

arts.ttl: We know where we’ll strengthen in summer, says Liverpool’s Arne Slot
arts.sum: Manager plans to make bigger move into transfer market Lack of business last summer was deliberate strategy Liverpool are plotting for a busier summer of recruitment as they look to mould the squad to Arne Slot’s demands, the Dutchman has said. The club have been quiet in the market since Slot replaced Jürgen Klopp but he has pinpointed the positions the team need to upgrade. Only Federico Chiesa has arrived at Anfield under Slot, although a deal has been agreed for the goalkeeper Giorgi Mamardashvili to join from Valencia. Liverpool lead the Premier League table and are 17 points clear of Sunday’s opponents Manchester City, but Slot and the sporting director Richard Hughes are working on creating a shortlist of targets. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot opens up on conversations with Jurgen Klopp as he seeks to emulate the German by leading Liverpool to the Premier League title
arts.sum: Arne Slot says Jurgen Klopp is often on the phone with compliments after games - but the pair have not spoken about how to negotiate a nail-biting title race.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sends blunt warning to Man City stars as ambitious rebuild plans take shape
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spent £170million on new recruits in the January transfer window and is expected to make further changes to his squad in the summer

arts.ttl: Liverpool to replace Diaz with striker - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool will sell Luis Diaz to raise funds for a striker, Manchester City will be ruthless in their summer clear-out and Arsenal revive interest in Dusan Vlahovic.

arts.ttl: 'You don't do that': Gary Lineker has an interesting theory about Mo Salah's contract situation at Liverpool
Analysis: Where Man City v Liverpool will be won and lost
arts.sum: On a personal note, Marmoush will be hoping Erling Haaland recovers from a knee injury, so that he can start on the left of Man City’s attack against Liverpool. In just six Premier League matches in 2025, Man City have scored 20 goals from only 81 shots, producing a league-high conversion rate of 24.7 per cent.
